name: Mach Number Calculator
description: Calculate Mach number as the ratio of speed to the speed of sound.
formulaDescription: Mach number is the ratio of an object's speed to the local speed of sound.

example.explanation: At 410 m/s with a speed of sound of 340 m/s, the Mach number is about 1.21.

faqs.question: What is Mach number?
faqs.answer: Mach number is the ratio of the speed of an object to the speed of sound in the surrounding medium.
